gui.touhou_little_maid.button.personal_d: -§a The maid's personal dimension screen, right click to directly open GUI
touhoulittlemaidpersonaldimension.config: Touhou little maid personal dimension Configs
Touhou little maid personal dimension Configs
Touhou little maid personal dimension Configs
config.touhoulittlemaidpersonaldimension: Touhou Little Maid Personal Dimension Config
Choose the type of dimension generation: MAID ISLAND (default, FLOATING ISLAND), OVERWORLD (normal overworld generation), CHERRY (only cherry grove biome)
Enable vanilla structures (like villages, temples, etc.) for OVERWORLD dimension type
Chance per chunk for my island structure to spawn in CHERRY dimension type (1 in x chunks)
The size of the world border in the personal dimension (diameter in blocks, only used for MAID ISLAND type)
If true, entities teleporting into the dimension will always be placed at the highest solid block.
If true, only entities in the allowedEntities list can spawn/exist. If false, only entities in blockedEntities are blocked.
List of entity IDs allowed in the dimension (when whitelist mode is enabled). 'touhou_little_maid:maid' is always allowed.
List of entity IDs blocked from the dimension (when whitelist mode is disabled).
List of player names or UUIDs allowed to enter the dimension. If empty, all players are allowed.
Whether players are allowed to break blocks in the dimension.
List of dimension IDs that entities/players are allowed to teleport to FROM the personal dimension. 'minecraft:overworld' is always allowed.
List of damage source names or mod IDs (regex supported) to block. Example: 'minecraft:fall', 'some_horror_mod:.*'
The Y level below which entities/items are teleported back onto the island.
If ON, tamed maids will expel entities that are about to kill their owner or other tamed maids. Maids need to be near the owner (configurable range).
Range in blocks that tamed maids will protect their owner from lethal threats.
If ON, all maids (including non-tamed) will expel entities that are about to kill any player or maid.
If ON, players in the personal dimension won't get hungry.
If ON, maids in the personal dimension can't die.
If ON, players in the personal dimension can't die (they'll stay at 1 health instead).
If ON, players and maids in the personal dimension will naturally regenerate health over time.
If ON, harmful potion effects will be completely blocked from affecting players and maids in the dimension.
If ON, maids in the personal dimension will emit light.
Cost in power points to use personal dimension teleportation (0 to disable)
Cost in experience points to use personal dimension teleportation (0 to disable)
gui.tlmpersonaldimension.title: Dimensional Control
message.tlmpersonaldimension.favorabilit: Maid favorability level is too low! Requires level 3.
message.tlmpersonaldimension.cooldown: Teleporter is on cooldown! Time remaining: %sm %ss
message.tlmpersonaldimension.teleporter_: You received a Maid Personal Teleporter!
message.tlmpersonaldimension.dim_type_se: Dimension type set to: %s. Teleport again to enter the new world.
tooltip.domain_expansion_bauble.trigger: §e⚡ §7Triggers when the maid is attacked §8(requires favorability lvl 3)
tooltip.domain_expansion_bauble.structur: §b⬡ §7Manifests a personal domain around her — a miniature extension of the maid's dimension
tooltip.domain_expansion_bauble.rules: §b⬡ §7Follows the same rules as your personal dimension §8(entity protection & survival options)
tooltip.domain_expansion_bauble.effect.a: §7  §a◆ §fMaid & Owner§7 — Strength II, Regeneration II, Resistance II
tooltip.cherry_domain_bauble.aura: §e⚑ §7Always active — a cherry blossom aura follows the maid wherever she walks
tooltip.cherry_domain_bauble.floor: §b⬡ §7Places pink petals on grass blocks §8(5x5 around feet, restored when she leaves)
tooltip.cherry_domain_bauble.replace: §b⬡ §7Transforms wood, planks, leaves, wool, glass, concrete & more to cherry/pink §8(5x5 x 20Y, except banners)
tooltip.cherry_domain_bauble.leaves: §b⬡ §7Creates a floating cherry leaf aura §8(5x5x5 around the maid)
tooltip.cherry_domain_bauble.rules: §b⬡ §7Applies a limited set of dimension rules around the maid §8(configurable)
tooltip.cat_familiar_bauble.summon: §e⚑ §7Summons a black cat companion bound to your maid
tooltip.cat_familiar_bauble.attack: §c⚔ §7Mirrors the maid's stats — attacks her targets §8(if enabled)
tooltip.cat_familiar_bauble.effect.dodge: §7  §d◆ §fUnder Attack§7 — §bCat Reflexes§7: 20% chance to dodge incoming hits
tooltip.cat_familiar_bauble.effect.taunt: §7  §d◆ §fLow Health§7 — §cSelf-Sacrifice§7: familiar taunts all nearby foes, drawing their wrath
tooltip.cat_familiar_bauble.effect.bad_l: §7  §d◆ §fOn Attack§7 — §5Bad Luck§7: curses the attacker with 10% miss chance for 1 min
tooltip.cat_familiar_bauble.effect.luck: §7  §d◆ §fCat Presence§7 — §6Fortune's Favor§7: grants §6Luck ∞§7 while the familiar is present
